_meta.description: Sample jobs dataset for Arya AI Full Stack Developer take-home assignment. Mix of tech roles across levels, locations, and seniority. Includes Indian and remote opportunities. Deliberately varied in quality of JD to reflect real scraped data.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: We are building the payments infrastructure for the Indian internet. As a Senior Backend Engineer, you will own critical services in our payments stack handling millions of transactions daily. You will design high-throughput systems, optimize database queries, and lead technical decisions. Experience with async Python (FastAPI/asyncio), PostgreSQL query optimization, and event-driven architectures is essential. You will collaborate with product, data, and infrastructure teams to ship reliable, scalable features. Strong understanding of distributed systems, caching strategies, and observability (Datadog, Sentry) expected. Bonus for experience with PCI-DSS compliance or financial systems.

jobs.title: AI Engineer - LLM Platform
jobs.description: Join us in building India's sovereign LLM stack. We are looking for AI engineers who can design and ship production-grade agentic systems. You will work on multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipelines over Indian language corpora, and model inference optimization. Hands-on experience with LangChain/LangGraph, pgvector or Qdrant, and cost-aware LLM routing is required. You should be comfortable reading ML papers and translating ideas into deployed systems. Familiarity with LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning is a strong plus.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: Build the consumer-facing experience that powers 10-minute deliveries across India. You will work on the Zepto app and internal tools using React, TypeScript, and Node.js. We care about shipping velocity without sacrificing reliability. You will own features end to end, from design reviews to production deploys. Prior e-commerce experience not required, but comfort with high-traffic consumer products is a plus.

jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer - AI Infrastructure
jobs.description: Scale AI powers the data and evaluation infrastructure behind frontier AI labs. As a Staff Engineer, you will architect our model serving and evaluation platform. You will make technical decisions that affect how the world's best AI labs train and test their models. Deep experience with GPU-backed inference, Kubernetes at scale, and LLM serving frameworks (vLLM, TGI) is required. You should have a track record of shipping systems that handle significant traffic and complexity. Strong written communication essential for this distributed role.

jobs.title: Python Backend Developer
jobs.description: Mentoria is India's leading career guidance platform. We are building Arya, our AI-powered job application agent. You will own backend services that power intelligent job matching, agentic outreach, and resume optimization. Work with FastAPI, async SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL with pgvector, Redis, and LangChain. You will ship features end to end and participate in architecture decisions. Startup experience or prior work on AI products strongly preferred.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Linear is building the tool that software teams use to plan and ship their work. We care deeply about craft, performance, and design. As a Frontend Engineer, you will work on the core Linear app, focusing on real-time collaboration, performance, and user experience. Deep TypeScript and React expertise is required. You should have shipped features that handle complex state and scale. Bonus for experience with CRDTs, WebSockets, or graphics programming.

jobs.title: ML Engineer
jobs.description: Join Cred's ML team to build credit risk and recommendation systems. You will train, deploy, and monitor models that drive real product decisions. We use a modern MLOps stack with MLflow, feature stores, and online inference. You should be comfortable with the full ML lifecycle: data pipelines, model training, A/B testing, and production monitoring. Strong SQL and Python required.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Freshworks powers customer engagement for 60,000+ businesses worldwide. As a DevOps Engineer, you will maintain our cloud infrastructure, improve deployment pipelines, and ensure reliability across our SaaS products. Deep Kubernetes and AWS experience is required. You will work on Terraform modules, observability (Prometheus, Grafana), and on-call rotations. Strong scripting skills in Python or Go expected.

jobs.title: AI Product Engineer
jobs.description: Perplexity is building the answer engine for the internet. We are hiring AI product engineers who sit at the intersection of research and product. You will ship user-facing AI features, optimize retrieval and generation quality, and run experiments that improve how millions of users search. You should be strong in both backend (Python) and frontend (TypeScript/React), and have real experience shipping LLM-powered products. Taste and judgment on AI UX matters more than framework knowledge.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer - Payments
jobs.description: Stripe builds economic infrastructure for the internet. Our payments backend handles hundreds of billions of dollars annually. As a Backend Engineer on the Payments team, you will work on systems that must be correct, fast, and reliable. Primary stack is Ruby and Go on PostgreSQL. Experience with distributed systems, strong consistency guarantees, and high-throughput services is essential. You should care about software quality at a deep level.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - Platform
jobs.description: Meesho is democratizing e-commerce for Bharat. As a Platform Engineer, you will build internal platforms and services that other teams at Meesho depend on. Primary stack is Java and Spring Boot. You should be comfortable with distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and handling scale. 2-5 years of backend experience required. Strong fundamentals over framework familiarity.

jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer - Agents
jobs.description: Anthropic is an AI safety company. We are hiring Senior AI Engineers to work on Claude's agentic capabilities. You will design evaluation systems, build agent harnesses, and ship improvements to how Claude uses tools and executes multi-step tasks. Deep experience with LLM agents in production is required, not just prototypes. You should have opinions on agent architecture, context management, and evaluation. Strong written communication is essential.

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Postman is the API platform used by 25 million developers. Join us to build the tools that shape how software is made. As a Full Stack Engineer, you will work across our frontend (React/TypeScript) and backend (Node.js) stack. You should be comfortable shipping end-to-end features and have opinions on developer experience. Experience with API tooling or developer products is a plus.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer 2
jobs.description: Amazon is hiring SDE2 engineers for our retail and AWS teams. You will design and build systems that operate at Amazon scale. Strong computer science fundamentals, system design skills, and production coding experience required. Primary languages are Java and Python. You should be able to work independently on ambiguous problems and deliver high-quality results.

jobs.title: Founding Engineer
jobs.description: We are a well-funded seed-stage startup building AI automation for mid-market businesses. Backed by top-tier investors. Looking for a founding engineer who can own product engineering end to end. You should be comfortable shipping fast, making architectural decisions, and wearing multiple hats. Experience with LLM-powered products is essential. This role comes with meaningful equity and the opportunity to shape the company's technical direction.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer - Search
jobs.description: Flipkart's Search team is responsible for helping 400M+ users find what they want. As a Backend Engineer on Search, you will work on ranking, retrieval, and infrastructure for our search systems. Experience with Elasticsearch or similar, machine learning for search, and large-scale data processing is required. Strong algorithms background expected.

jobs.title: AI/ML Engineer - NLP
jobs.description: Observe.AI is the enterprise voice AI platform for contact centers. We analyze millions of customer conversations to surface insights. You will work on transcription, LLM-powered summarization, and conversation intelligence. Deep NLP experience required, including transformer architectures and speech-to-text systems. Production ML experience is essential.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description: Atlassian builds tools that help every team unleash their potential. Join us to work on Jira, Confluence, or our AI features. You will design systems used by millions of users. Strong Java and backend engineering skills required. Prior experience shipping at scale in a large engineering org expected.

jobs.title: AI Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: Rocketlane is the customer onboarding platform trusted by 500+ SaaS companies. We are building AI features that help our users plan and execute customer projects faster. As an AI Full Stack Developer, you will own features end to end across Python backend and React frontend. Experience with LLMs in production and comfort across the stack is required. Small team, big ownership.

jobs.title: Backend Intern
jobs.description: Swiggy is hiring backend engineering interns for a 6-month program with potential full-time conversion. You will work on internal tools and small features under senior engineer mentorship. Looking for final-year engineering students or recent graduates with strong CS fundamentals. Internship stipend of 80k-100k per month.

jobs.title: Principal Engineer - AI Platform
jobs.description: Sprinklr is hiring a Principal Engineer to lead our AI Platform group. You will define architecture, mentor senior engineers, and own technical strategy for our generative AI product suite. 10+ years of experience required, with at least 3 years building AI/ML platforms at scale. You should have a track record of technical leadership and shipping complex systems. Rare and high-impact opportunity.

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer - Growth
jobs.description: Notion's Growth team is responsible for helping new users discover, try, and adopt Notion. You will ship experiments, build growth infrastructure, and improve activation. Strong full-stack engineering skills required, with particular emphasis on frontend and shipping fast. Experience with A/B testing and product analytics is a plus.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: Looking for Software Engineer with 2-4 years of experience in .NET Core and Angular. Will work on client projects for US and EU customers. Immediate joiners preferred. Night shift may be required. Good communication skills needed. Bond of 2 years applicable.

jobs.title: AI Research Engineer
jobs.description: Google DeepMind is hiring AI Research Engineers to work on frontier AI research. You will partner with researchers to turn ideas into working systems, contribute to papers, and ship research infrastructure. Strong publication record or equivalent open-source contributions preferred. PhD in ML, CS, or related field, or equivalent industry experience. Deep knowledge of modern deep learning required.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer - Agentic Workflows
jobs.description: Glean is the AI assistant for work, used by companies like Uber, Pinterest, and Databricks. We are hiring backend engineers to build our agentic workflow engine. You will design systems that let enterprise users automate complex multi-step tasks with AI agents. Deep experience with LLM agents, tool calling, and enterprise-grade backend systems required. You should be comfortable making tradeoffs around latency, cost, and reliability.
